# Pareto — Multi-Objective Optimization

> Multi-objective optimization engine for Genesis Conductor.
> HAVIS/Pareto architect vertex.

## Features
- Pareto frontier computation
- Multi-objective trade-off analysis
- AI agent decision support

## Genesis Conductor Role
- Architect vertex for optimization decisions
- Part of fleet coordination system

## Creator
Igor Holt — AI Architect
Genesis Conductor Engine
